name: Hermits
recipeIngredient: Dry sugar substitute equal to 2/3 cup Brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and brown sugar together at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and mix at medium speed for 1 minute, scraping down the bowl before and after adding eggs.
3. Stir flour, baking powder, salt, dry sugar substitute equal to 2/3 cup Brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, walnuts, and raisins together to blend well.
4. Add the mixture along with water (around 70°F), to the creamy mixture; mix at medium speed to blend well.
5. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoons onto cookie sheets that have been sprayed with Pam spray or lined with aluminum foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are browned on the bottom.
7. Remove from oven and allow to cool on a wire rack until room temperature.
Food exchanges per serving: 1 starch/bread exchange & 1 fat exchange
Calories: 114
Fat: 5g
Carbohydrates: 15g
Sodium: 89mg
Protein: 2g
